one_time_description: Unrealized loss on investment in Zenabis Global Inc. shares due to 97.1% decline in share price from $3.30 to $0.095 per share
economic_notes: Commercial fisheries and forestry operations present. Investment in E.Gagnon & Fils (crab fishery). Land settlement trust fund with Royal Trust Company for band members under age of majority totalling approximately $15.4M. Band member mortgage guarantees totalling $1,281,888 under Section 10 of Indian Act.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Nation is located in Quebec (Listuguj, Quebec) near New Brunswick border. Prior year (2019) figures were restated due to ISC and Health Canada reviews. Significant unrealized loss of $8.25M on Zenabis Global Inc. investment (97.1% share price decline). Land Settlement Trust Fund of ~$15.4M is both an asset and offsetting liability. Restricted cash includes Land Settlement Trust Fund ($15,363,549), Replacement Reserve Fund ($691,834), and Operating Reserve Fund ($442,345). Current liabilities estimated from Accounts Payable ($3,664,848) and Due to Governments ($1,883,344). Schedule of remuneration for elected and unelected officials referenced (pages 29-30) but values not included in extracted text. Government transfers per Note 23: ISC $29,499,535, Health Canada $5,399,946, CMHC $823,134, Other federal $1,290,031, Provincial $2,564,775. Total government transfers $39,577,421. OSR calculated as $72,838,435 minus $39,577,421 = $33,261,014. Segments include: Band Administration, Education, Health, Social Services, Public Security, Forestry, Economic Development, Police Operations, Commercial Fisheries, Capital Operations, Housing.
